sub_modules.fp_bpf_coeff_rom: Combinational coefficient ROM that emits the exact binary32 FIR coefficient vector.
sub_modules.fp_bpf_mac_comb: Combinational binary32 sequential multiply-accumulate FIR datapath over the sample window and coefficient vector.
sub_modules.fp_bpf_valid_gate: Combinational valid propagation helper used by the top-level sequential control.
